string.value: Tap to log in to V2EX

string.value: Saved, used only for V2EX API v2 advanced features

string.value: Only clears the locally saved Personal Access Token. Web login stays signed in.

string.value: Log in to view blocked and ignored items

string.name: login_to_view_following
string.value: Log in to view followed users

string.name: base64_subtitle
string.value: Default to tap-to-view to avoid directly exposing email, WeChat, or other plaintext.

string.name: reading_preview_intro
string.value: This is the live preview area for reading text scaling. Drag the slider below to scale body text, headings, lists, quotes, and code together, approximating the reading feel in actual topic details.

string.name: reading_preview_body
string.value: V2EX discussions usually contain short sentences, links, quotes, and code snippets. The preview stays on the page background to avoid extra cards affecting typography judgment.

string.name: reading_preview_quote
string.value: > If a setting lets you finish the paragraph without pausing, it is probably the right one.

string.name: restore_reading_scale_message
string.value: Restore text scale to the default value. Continue?

string.name: clear_cache_message
string.value: Only offline cache will be cleared. Login state and preferences will be kept. Continue?

string.name: clear_local_data_message
string.value: This clears locally saved read later items, followed nodes, recently viewed items, read state, drafts, search history, notification cache, and offline cache. Login state and preferences are kept. Continue?

string.name: no_local_log_files
string.value: No local log files to share

string.name: reopen_keeps_logs
string.value: Recent launch logs are kept after reopening the app
